About Teknisk

Three Generations of Masonry. One Uncompromising Standard.

Teknisk Masonry exists to be the masonry partner that GCs, developers, and commercial builders can count on — every time. We bring deep trade knowledge, hands-on leadership, and an unwavering commitment to quality that shows in every wall we build. When your project demands precision, reliability, and a team that shows up, Teknisk delivers.

Our Mission

To deliver exceptional masonry craftsmanship that general contractors, developers, and commercial builders can stake their reputation on — backed by three generations of expertise, a culture built on integrity, and a team that treats every project like it carries our name.

We partner with forward-thinking GCs and developers who demand more than just a masonry sub — they need a knowledgeable, experienced team that speaks their language, solves problems before they become delays, and backs every project with three generations of masonry expertise. That's exactly what Teknisk brings to every job site.

Core Values

01

Reliability

When we commit to a schedule, we honour it. Our crew is on site when we say we will be — because we understand that in commercial construction, your timeline depends on ours.

02

Getting It Done

We're solution-focused and results-driven. No matter the complexity of the project, our goal is simple — get the job done right, on time, and to a standard that makes everyone proud.

03

Stability

A great company starts with a great team. We invest in our people, foster a culture of respect and craftsmanship, and build the kind of workplace that attracts and retains the best in the trade.

04

Quality

Poor workmanship keeps us up at night — and that's exactly why it never leaves our job site. Every joint, every course, every finish is held to the highest standard. Our work is our reputation.

Owner & Operator

Bo Jorgensen

Masonry isn't just Bo's profession — it's in his blood. A third-generation mason with over 20 years of hands-on experience, Bo has built his career around commercial masonry excellence and a deep respect for the craft his family has passed down. Heavily focused on commercial work, Bo leads from the front — you'll find him on site, working alongside his crew, teaching technique, and holding every project to an impeccable standard. He doesn't just manage the work; he lives it. A true leader who stands firmly behind Teknisk's culture of quality and reliability, Bo has earned the trust of GCs and developers across the Lower Mainland through consistent delivery and the kind of career equity that only comes from decades of doing the work right. When he's not on site, Bo is exactly where he wants to be — spending quality time with his family.

What We Do

Masonry Solutions for
Every Scale of Build

We deliver custom masonry installation for commercial builds, multi-family residential developments, and institutional projects across the Lower Mainland. Whether you're a GC tendering a large commercial scope or a developer looking to elevate your next project's exterior, Teknisk brings the expertise, crew, and commitment to get it done right.

From the first course of block to the final brick on a finished façade, our team applies extreme attention to detail, clear communication, and a standard of workmanship that reflects three generations of masonry excellence.

Our Process

Our partners are everything to us — and we accomplish a great deal together. On every project, you have our dedicated team from the time of bid through to deficiency wrap-up. We use internal scheduling systems to build realistic work-back timelines and track progress to ensure efficiency, keeping your project on time and on budget. Our office and field teams are in constant communication — meaning whoever you speak with at any point during the project is fully versed in the details of your scope.

01

Commercial & Institutional

Schools, municipal buildings, retail centers, and warehouses — we bring a precise, professional approach to every commercial scope, no matter the size or complexity.

02

Multi-Family Residential

Condo developments, townhouse complexes, and mixed-use builds. We integrate seamlessly with GC schedules and keep the masonry scope moving so the rest of your project stays on track.

03

Full Disclosure

We keep you informed every step of the way. Our team provides regular progress updates and our project management approach gives you a clear picture of where things stand at any given time.

04

Precision Workmanship

Our workmanship is our reputation — and we protect it on every project. We are committed to ensuring every finished scope is a true reflection of our craft and the Teknisk standard.

05

Creative Solutions

Job sites are dynamic — surprises happen. Our experienced field and support team brings collective decades of masonry knowledge to solve problems quickly and keep the project moving forward.

06

Masonry Experts

From large-scale commercial masonry to restoration and architectural façades, Teknisk welcomes projects of all scopes. We adapt to site conditions, communicate daily, and deliver with confidence.

Our Services

Specialized in Every
Masonry Application

Placeholder — describe your full services menu here. We'll update with your final copy once you send it over.

Request a Quote
01
Brick Masonry
Full brick installation for commercial, institutional, and residential applications.
+

Brick masonry is one of the oldest and most trusted building methods in the world — and at Teknisk, we bring that timeless craft to modern commercial construction. We install full brick systems across a wide range of applications including single wythe, cavity wall, and brick veneer systems. Our team works with all standard and custom brick types, colours, and bond patterns, ensuring the finished product meets both the structural specifications and the architectural intent of every project. Whether it's a multi-storey commercial façade or an institutional building envelope, our bricklayers deliver clean coursework, consistent joint profiles, and a finish that reflects our standard of excellence.

  • Cavity Wall Systems
  • Single Wythe Construction
  • Brick Veneer
  • Commercial Facades
  • Custom Bond Patterns
  • Institutional Buildings
02
Concrete Block (CMU)
Load-bearing and non-load-bearing concrete masonry unit construction for commercial and industrial builds.
+

Concrete masonry units (CMU) are the backbone of commercial and industrial construction — and Teknisk has the experience and crew to handle CMU scopes of any size. From load-bearing structural walls and foundation systems to non-load-bearing partition cores and fire-rated assemblies, we build to tight tolerances and exacting specifications. Our team is experienced with standard, split-face, and architectural CMU in a wide range of sizes and configurations. We understand the downstream impact that masonry delays have on a project schedule — so we show up, we stay on track, and we coordinate closely with the GC to keep the project moving.

  • Load-Bearing Structural Walls
  • Foundation Systems
  • Partition & Core Walls
  • Split-Face & Architectural CMU
  • Fire-Rated Assemblies
  • Industrial & Warehouse Builds
03
Natural Stone
Cut stone, fieldstone, and manufactured stone veneer for facades and feature walls that command attention.
+

Natural stone masonry adds a level of sophistication and permanence that no other material can match. Teknisk installs cut stone, fieldstone, river rock, ledgestone, and manufactured stone veneer for commercial facades, feature walls, monument signage, landscape features, and architectural accents. Every stone installation is approached with a craftsman's eye — careful material selection, precise setting, and meticulous joint work that makes the finished product look as though it grew from the ground itself. Whether the design calls for a sleek contemporary stone facade or a warm, textured natural finish, our team has the skill and experience to execute it to an impeccable standard.

  • Cut Stone Facades
  • Fieldstone & River Rock
  • Manufactured Stone Veneer
  • Feature & Accent Walls
  • Monument & Signage Bases
  • Landscape Stone Features
04
Tuckpointing & Restoration
Repointing, tuckpointing, and structural masonry repair to restore the life and performance of existing structures.
+

Over time, mortar joints deteriorate — and when left unaddressed, water infiltration and structural compromise follow. Teknisk's restoration team specializes in tuckpointing, repointing, and full masonry restoration for commercial, institutional, and heritage structures. We carefully match mortar colour, composition, and profile to the existing masonry, ensuring a seamless, long-lasting repair that restores both the structural integrity and visual appeal of the building envelope. From localized joint repair to full-facade repointing programs, we assess every project thoroughly and execute with the same precision we bring to new construction.

  • Tuckpointing & Repointing
  • Mortar Colour Matching
  • Structural Brick & Stone Repair
  • Heritage Building Restoration
  • Water Infiltration Remediation
  • Facade Assessment & Repair
05
Retaining Walls & Hardscape
Engineered retaining walls and exterior hardscape built to spec — durable, on-grade, and site integrated.
+

Masonry retaining walls and hardscape elements are as much about engineering as they are about aesthetics. Teknisk constructs retaining walls in brick, block, and natural stone — built to structural specifications, properly drained, and designed to perform over the long term. Our hardscape work extends to exterior paving, steps, planters, courtyards, and site feature walls — all coordinated with the project's civil and landscape drawings to ensure every element is on-grade, on-spec, and built to last. We treat every exterior masonry element with the same standard of craftsmanship we apply inside the building envelope.

  • Engineered Retaining Walls
  • Brick & Block Site Walls
  • Exterior Steps & Landings
  • Planter Walls & Courtyards
  • Masonry Paving & Hardscape
  • Civil & Landscape Coordination
06
Project Management & Estimating
Detailed takeoffs, competitive tender packages, and hands-on coordination from award through completion.
+

A great masonry scope starts with an accurate, well-thought-out estimate — and Teknisk delivers both. Our estimating team produces detailed material takeoffs and competitive tender packages that give GCs and owners confidence from the start. Once awarded, our project management approach keeps every scope on schedule through proactive planning, daily field communication, and tight coordination with the broader project team. We use real-time scheduling tools to track progress, flag issues early, and keep our crew aligned with the GC's master schedule. From your first call to the final deficiency walk, you'll have a dedicated point of contact who knows your project inside and out.

  • Detailed Material Takeoffs
  • Competitive Tender Packages
  • Schedule & Progress Tracking
  • Field & Office Coordination
  • Value Engineering Support
  • Deficiency & Closeout Management
07
Seismic Upgrades
Masonry seismic reinforcement for existing commercial and institutional structures — bringing aging buildings up to current code.
+

Older masonry structures — particularly unreinforced brick and concrete block buildings — are among the most vulnerable in a seismic event. Teknisk provides masonry seismic upgrade services for existing commercial and institutional buildings, working alongside structural engineers to reinforce walls, improve wall-to-floor and wall-to-roof connections, and bring aging masonry structures up to current code requirements. Whether it's anchoring unreinforced masonry to an internal lateral system, reinforcing parapets, or completing a phased upgrade program, our team understands the structural demands of seismic work and executes with the precision and care these projects require.

  • Unreinforced Masonry (URM) Reinforcement
  • Wall-to-Floor & Wall-to-Roof Connections
  • Parapet Reinforcement
  • Structural Engineer Coordination
  • Phased Upgrade Programs
  • Code Compliance & Permit Support

We're Not Looking for Average —
We Want the Exceptional.

We don't settle for ordinary. Teknisk is built on skilled, driven tradespeople who take pride in their craft, show up ready to work, and hold themselves to a standard most crews can't match. If that sounds like you — we want to meet you.

Work With the Best

Join a crew of experienced, hard-working tradespeople who take their craft seriously and push each other to be better every single day on site.

Grow Your Craft

Bo leads from the front and teaches hands-on. From labourer to journeyman to foreman — we invest in the people who show up ready to learn and ready to lead.

Leave a Legacy

Every wall you build carries your name. Work on commercial projects across the Lower Mainland that will stand for decades — and be proud of every one of them.

Join the Crew

Build Something You're
Proud Of

Teknisk is more than a job — it's a culture built on craftsmanship, respect, and accountability. We work hard, we take care of our team, and we deliver work that makes everyone proud. If you're a skilled tradesperson who takes their work seriously, there's a place for you here.

Competitive Wages — We pay for skill, experience, and reliability. Come ready to work, and we'll make it worth your while.

Steady Work — With a strong GC network and a full project pipeline, our crews stay busy year-round.

Hands-On Leadership — Bo is on site, teaching technique and holding the standard. You'll learn from someone who has been doing this for over 20 years.

Room to Grow — From labourer to journeyman to foreman — we build careers as well as we build walls.

We're Always Looking
for Exceptional People

If you're a skilled tradesperson who takes pride in their craft, shows up ready to work, and wants to be part of a team that holds itself to a high standard — we want to hear from you.

What We're Looking For

Labourers, apprentices, journeymen, and foremen with masonry experience. Reliability, craftsmanship, and a strong work ethic are non-negotiable.

Please share your resume via a link. We accept Google Drive, Dropbox, LinkedIn, or any publicly accessible URL.
